SETTING_ACCESSIBILITY_SETTINGS_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display Accessibility settings: `Settings -> System -> Accessibility` 0: Display 1: Not display
SETTING_APK_LOGIN_PASSWORD - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Sets administrator login password.
SETTING_APK_NEED_LOGIN - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether administrator login is required or not when launching the Settings app.
SETTING_APP_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display App settings: `Settings -> Device -> Apps` 0: Display 1: Not display
SETTING_BATTERY_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not do display Battery settings: `Settings -> Device -> Battery` 0: Display 1: Not display
SETTING_BLUETOOTH_FILE_TRANSFER - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to enable bluetooth file transfer.
SETTING_DATA_USAGE_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display Data Usage settings: `Settings -> wireless & networks -> Data Usage` 0: Display 1: Not display
SETTING_DEVELOPMENT_SETTINGS_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display Development settings: `Settings -> System -> Developer options`
SETTING_DEVICE_INFO_ITEMS_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display the following info: Bit 1: 0: Display status info. 1: Not display status info. Bit 2: 0: Display legal info. 1: Not display legal info. Bit 3: 0: Display kernel version. 1: Not display kernel version. Bit 4: 0: Display Bootloader version. 1: Not display Bootloader version. Bit 5: 0: Display Baseband version. 1: Not display Baseband version.
SETTING_DISABLE_APP_SWITCH_KEY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to disable App Switch Key.
SETTING_DISABLE_HOME_KEY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to disable home key.
SETTING_HOME_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display Home settings: `Settings -> Apps -> Find the launcher app -> Home app`.
SETTING_LANGUAGE_USER_DICTIONARY_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display Personal Dictionary options: `Settings -> System -> Language & input -> Personal dictionary` 0: Display 1: Not display
SETTING_LAUNCHER - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Sets Launcher.
SETTING_LOCALES - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Sets locales.
SETTING_LOCATION_SETTINGS_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display Location settings: `Settings -> System -> Location` 0: Display 1: Not display
SETTING_NOTIFICATION_ITEMS_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display Notification items settings: `Settings -> Device -> Sound` Bit 1: 0: Display media volume settings. 1: Not display media volume settings. Bit 2: 0: Display ringtone volume settings. 1: Not display ringtone volume settings. Bit 3: 0: Display device ringtone settings. 1: Not display device ringtone settings. Bit 4: 0: Display default notification ringtone settings. 1: Not display default notification ringtone settings. Bit 5(Not supported for overseas devices): 0: Display dial pad sound settings. 1: Not display dial pad sound settings. Bit 6(Not supported for overseas devices): 0: Display screen lock sound settings. 1: Not display screen lock sound settings. Bit 7(Not supported for overseas devices): 0: Display touch sound settings. 1: Not display touch sound settings. Bit 8(Not supported for overseas devices): 0: Display touch vibration settings. 1: Not display touch vibration settings.
SETTING_OTA_UPDATE - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display OTA update: `Settings -> System -> About device -> System updates` 0: Display 1: Not display
SETTING_PAYMENT_CERT_UPDATE_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display Payment Certification Update settings: `Settings -> System -> Security -> Update Payment Certificate` 0: Display 1: Not display
SETTING_PRINT_SETTINGS_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display Printing settings: `Settings -> System -> Printing` 0: Display 1: Not display
SETTING_PRIVACY_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display Privacy settings: `Settings -> System -> Backup & reset` 0: Display 1: Not display
SETTING_PROCESSOR_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display Processor info: `Settings -> System -> About device -> Processor info` 0: Display 1: Not display
SETTING_PRODUCT_MODEL - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Deprecated.
Replaced by DeviceManager.getDeviceInfo().
SETTING_PROTECTED_CHARGE_CAPACITY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Sets charge capacity.
SETTING_PROTECTED_CHARGE_ENABLE - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether to enable charge protection.
SETTING_PROTECTED_RECHARGE_CAPACITY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Sets recharge capacity.
SETTING_SECURITY_SETTINGS_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display Security settings: `Settings -> System -> Security` 0: Display 1: Not display
SETTING_STORAGE_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display Storage settings: `Settings -> Device -> Storage`.
SETTING_VPN_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display VPN settings: `Settings -> Wireless & networks -> More -> VPN` 0: Display 1: Not display
SETTING_WALLPAPER_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display Wallpaper settings: `Settings -> Device -> Display -> Wallpaper` 0: Display 1: Not display
